Unique identifier for the delivery method

price.description: Price associated with the delivery account

agentName.description: Name of the agent associated with the account, This is required when DeliveryAccountType = PhoneRouting

agentPhone.description: Phone number of the agent, This is required when DeliveryAccountType = PhoneRouting

alternateDeliveryMethodUID.description: Unique identifier for the alternate delivery method, This is optional

hourMax.description: Maximum number of deliveries allowed per hour. If set to -1, no limit is applied.

dayMax.description: Maximum number of deliveries allowed per day. If set to -1, no limit is applied.

weekMax.description: Maximum number of deliveries allowed per week. If set to -1, no limit is applied.

monthMax.description: Maximum number of deliveries allowed per month. If set to -1, no limit is applied.

criteria.description: List of criteria for the delivery account. Each criterion defines specific conditions or rules that must be met for delivery validation

leadFieldUID.description: Unique identifier for the lead field

type.description: Type of criteria for the delivery account

useOrder.description: Indicates if order usage is enabled

automationEnabled.description: Indicates if automation is enabled for the account

isExclusive.description: Make leads sent to this delivery account exclusive

requestBody.description: Request body - Required for DeliveryType: HttpPost, XMLJson, SOAP, and PingPost

emailOrSmsTemplate.description: Template used for formatting delivery - Required for DeliveryType: Email, SMS

deliveryAddress.description: Address used for delivery (URL, email, etc.).

smtpAuth.description: Indicates if SMTP authentication is required.

deliveryDays.description: Allowed delivery days - Default to empty collection (all allowed)

allow.description: Indicates if delivery is allowed within this day/time window.

value.description: Value of the field or setting.

regularExpression.description: Regular expression used for pattern matching or validation.

hasMap.description: Whether FieldMappings should be used for mapping explicit values

port.description: Server port (null for auto-detect: FTP=21, SFTP=22)
